public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as discipline clerk.
manner: Keeps language exact, as if wording itself is part of the custody chain. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a discipline clerk still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of discipline clerk in and around Artificers’ Guild, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Artificers’ Guild workable through the obligations of discipline clerk while managing the immediate pressure of resource depletion in Soreheim Alliance.
hidden_pressure: Must keep records, witness, or account integrity credible while people try to hurry, blur, or weaponize the paper trail. Around Artificers’ Guild, that usually means carrying resource depletion, sabotage, predatory frontier ecology without letting the role of discipline clerk visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Vorga Ironslope can entangle the party in seals, claims, or proof requirements that others are trying to blur on purpose.
Vorga Ironslope can trade precise, actionable information once the party secures or clarifies the record they protect.

what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Discipline Clerk, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Soreheim Alliance.
what_they_refuse: Vorga Ironslope refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.

how_they_can_help: Vorga Ironslope can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Vorga Ironslope adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
